ddls:
CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date corresponding to the time period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time period */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the time period (e.g., day, week, month) */,
  "time_period_type" TEXT /* Type of the time period (e.g., observation, forecast) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "epidemic_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the epidemic model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the model */,
  "mae" REAL /* Mean absolute error (MAE) of the model */,
  "mse" REAL /* Mean squared error (MSE) of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "time_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time period for the accessed data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, public) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "transmission_characteristics" TEXT /* Transmission characteristics of the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_runs" (
  "model_run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model run */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for the run */,
  "time_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time period for the run */,
  "predicted_values" TEXT /* Predicted values from the model run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_runs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES epidemic_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_runs_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "boundaries" TEXT /* Boundaries of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that uses the parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES epidemic_models ("model_id")
)
